subject: style(map): use theme info/infoContent for search center dot
body:
Replace hardcoded #4285F4 (Google Maps blue) with DaisyUI info/infoContent
theme tokens so the search center dot adapts to light/dark mode. Shadow
glow also derives from the info color at 50% opacity.

Tags: map, theme, consistency
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: map
Semver: patch
